web.description: Discover luxury living at 2200 Brickell, a Miami condo offering one to four-bedroom residences. Enjoy state-of-the-art amenities and a vibrant cityscape ...
web.markdown:
![2200 BRICKELL Logo](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/logo-hero.png?v=1)

[![Arrow down in a circle](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/scroll-down-arrow-text.png)![Arrow down in a circle](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/scroll-down-arrow.png)](https://2200brickell.com/#)

![2200 BRICKELL](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/leaf-logo-gold.png)

## DISCOVER LIFE   WITHOUT COMPROMISE

Uniquely positioned so you can live it up in the city yet escape from it all,

2200 BRICKELL is the perfect home for urban dwellers and nature lovers alike.

# 2200 brickell,    a new standard for inspired city living.

[![Brickell Building Render](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/film-image.jpg?v=2)![play film button](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/play-film-btn.png?v=1)![play film button](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/play-film-btn-hover.png)](https://2200brickell.com/#)

![2200 BRICKELL](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/logo-gold.png)

## CENTER CITY   SERENITY

Luxuriously appointed 1 to 4 bedroom residences,

intentionally designed for a life in balance.

![gallery view](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/home/gallery-image.png)![bedroom](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/home/gallery-image-2.png)

[VIEW RESIDENCESVIEW RESIDENCES](https://2200brickell.com/residences/)

![2200 BRICKELL](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/logo-gold.png)

## A BETTER WAY   TO BRICKELL

From state-of-the-art shared spaces to innovative private facilities, these carefully crafted amenities embody what it means to live well in Brickell.

1/13

[View AmenitiesView Amenities](https://2200brickell.com/amenities/)

## BRICKELL

## IN THE HEART OF MIAMI

A vibrant cityscape of glittering high-rises awash with world-class culture, creativity, and entertainment – this uncompromising neighborhood has earned its reputation as one of the world’s most irresistible places to live.

[Explore LocationExplore Location](https://2200brickell.com/location/)

![2200 BRICKELL](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/leaf-logo-gold.png)

## A MODERN OASIS

The intersection of urban appeal and the undeniable allure of the tropics,

this is Brickell living reimagined.

![woman walking with hat in hand](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/home/woman-walking-with-hat-in-hand.jpg?v=03091)![building](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/home/gallery-building.jpg?v=0309)![men on cycle](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/home/gallery-lifestyle.jpg?v=0309)![Miami Pool](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/4051_MIAMI_POOL_FINAL_ZG-_4_4-scaled.jpg)

![Logo Brickell 2200](https://2200brickell.com/wp-content/themes/b2200/images/logo-green.png)

## DISCOVER LIFE   WITHOUT COMPROMISE
